below_are_what_applies_to_you: Belows are what applies to you
below_you_will_see_assets_subject_to_zak: Below you will see the assets subject to zakat and the deductible debts.
are_you_unsure_about_one_or_more_options: Are you unsure about one or more options? Select them anyway to receive more information in a later step.
enter_the_amount_of_money_you_currently_: Enter the amount of money you currently have.
enter_gold_silver_value: Enter the value of your gold and silver.
enter_the_total_amount_of_your_assets: Enter the total amount of your assets below, including checking, savings accounts and savings under your mattress.
enter_the_current_market_value_of_your_g: Enter the current market value of your gold and silver holdings here.
if_you_dont_know_the_value_you_can_also_: If you don't know the value, you can also enter the weight in grams (switch to grams to do this).
certain_debts_can_be_deducted: Certain debts can be deducted. We advise you to be as conservative as possible in this regard.
the_zakat_percentage_on_your_wealth_is: The Zakat (2.5%) on your wealth is
zakat_is_one_of_the_most_important: Zakat is one of the most important pillars in Islam. We support you with the calculation and payment.
zakat_is_paid_on_certain_assets: Zakat is paid on certain assets. Select your assets in the calculator and enter their value.
determine_the_purpose_of_your_zakat: Determine the purpose of your Zakat .
your_zakat_changes_lives: Your Zakat changes lives. Decide for yourself where your Zakat should be used. Alternatively, you can leave the decision to Zakat Germany. That's also possible!
completion_and_payment: Completion and payment of your Zakat
we_provide_you_with_transparent: We provide you with a transparent overview of your calculation and Zakat payment. This way, you can fulfill the third pillar of your faith with a clear conscience.
total_amount_owed_to_others: Total amount owed to others (Max repayment in 12 months)
outstanding_liabilities: Outstanding liabilities (e.g., loans, credit card balances)
